commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cbf7fab7e884ec2a567a5a1eb8cc428eafd2c34a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes doctor empty-allowlist scanning to suppress parent-scope group-allowlist and plugin extra warnings when enabled sub-accounts appear to provide their own allowlists, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +81, Tests +120. Total +201 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of PR head shows supported configs with top-level `apiRoot` preserve the reported false-positive, and supported top-level SecretRef `botToken` configs suppress a legitimate active-default-account warning; no read-only command execution was needed to establish those paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can replace the top-level active-account heuristic and add the missing regression tests on this PR branch.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
